Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Office of the Vice President, Division of Campus Life records, 1967-1990.
Collection Number: 4-6-1621

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Office of the Vice President, Division of Campus Life records, 1967-1990.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
4-6-1621
Abstract:
Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.
Creator:
Cornell University. Vice President for Campus Affairs. Division of Campus Life
Gurowitz, William D.
Quanitities:
131 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Records of William D. Gurowitz, including personnel, payroll, budget, and general office files.
RELATED MATERIALS

See also Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-904, Cornell University Office of the Vice President for Student Affairs Records, #4-6-1182, and Division of Student and Academic Services Records, #4-16-2926.
Access Restrictions:

Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Vice President for Campus Affairs, Division of Campus Life. Records. #4-6-1621. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Gurowitz, William D.
Cornell University -- : Administration.
